title: Filipino Chicken Fried Rice
description: A simple and flavorful Filipino-inspired dish made with chicken, rice, and a hint of charred flavor. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the charred garlic and fried shallots and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the cooked rice and stir-fry until well combined with the chicken and vegetables.
Add the soy sauce, fish sauce, and sugar, and stir-fry until the rice is well coated.
Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with additional fried shallots if desired.
